goals.title: Install DietrichGebert/ponytail globally for Codex and verify it with...
goals.objective: Install DietrichGebert/ponytail globally for Codex and verify it with command/file/plugin evidence. Then improve PathFinder AI GraphRAG analysis flow in C:\Users\SSAFY\Desktop\t08_project using minimal clean code: relevant KG fact retrieval instead of all facts, taxonomy-backed study/interview context, backend result normalization/evidence traceability, removal or replacement of fake frontend scores, and preservation of private-data separation.
